# Rozanolixizumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Rozanolixizumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Rozanolixizumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>28 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Rozanolixizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Rystiggo is indicated as an add-on to standard therapy for the treatment of generalised myasthenia gravis (gMG) in adult patients who are anti-acetylcholine receptor (AChR) or anti-muscle-specific...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>bronchitis（95.3%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（95.0%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（94.7%）</li>
<li>hemoglobinopathy（94.2%）</li>
<li>gastric carcinoma（93.6%）</li>
<li>partial deletion of the short arm of chromosome 16（93.4%）</li>
<li>diffuse gastric adenocarcinoma（93.4%）</li>
<li>beta-thalassemia with other manifestations（93.1%）</li>
<li>hemolytic anemia due to glucophosphate isomerase deficiency（92.8%）</li>
<li>pyruvate kinase deficiency of red cells（92.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/rozanolixizumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
